violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

2-door reach-in, located in the kitchen, is not in good repair. It is not currently being used. Service present during inspection to repair the unit. All TCS foods had been relocated to properly functioning refrigeration units. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom between the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Thermometer is lacking in milk chest cooler #2 (back of cafeteria). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

The doors to the outside, located on the left side of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom between the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023

Hot hold unit in the service area is not in good repair. On the highest temperature setting the unit maintains food temperatures 134 - 135 degrees F. Steam table is heating foods to proper temperatures. This unit must be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The outside dumpster is not covered (side doors as well as top cover). Top cover observed to be bent/in poor repair. This must be repaired/replaced. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
